coreIssue: This performance conversation is likely about whether Tom has recalibrated to Principal expectations on the new team or is still delivering mainly as a strong executor.
openingQuestion: What does Principal-level impact on this team look like to you today, and where are you intentionally shaping outcomes beyond your own delivery?
listenFor: whether he names a specific cross-team decision or stakeholder situation where he set expectations early
whether if they describe Principal scope, they talk about leverage, judgment, and influence or stay centered on personal execution
whether he volunteers a recent moment of ambiguity and explains how he decided to push through, ask questions, or escalate
avoid: do not turn the conversation into a vague debate about titles instead of concrete Principal behaviours on this team
do not overload him with every concern at once; anchor on one or two recent examples and test his current frame
goodOutcome: You and Tom have agreed what Principal-level impact means on this team and identified one cross-team area where he will exercise visible judgment and influence beyond direct execution.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where Tom delivered solidly but Principal-level expectation-setting or cross-team leverage was missing, so you can test his interpretation against something concrete.
